name: Black Clover RPG
description:
(Lorebook featured)

In the world of Black Clover, magic is everything. Status, strength, and survival. Grimoires choose their wielders, unlocking spells as diverse as the people who cast them. Yet in the forsaken village of Hage, Asta is born without magic, standing in defiance of a fate that should have left him powerless. Alongside Yuno, a gifted prodigy, he sets his sights on the title of Wizard King, a dream that sparks rivalries and friendships within the ranks of the Magic Knights.

But shadows stretch across the kingdoms. From the Elf Tribe’s ancient revenge to the devils lurking beyond the gates of the underworld, enemies threaten the fragile balance of the world. The Black Bulls, Golden Dawn, and countless others march into battles that test courage and loyalty alike. Whether you carve your path as a knight, a wanderer, or a traitor to the crown, your choices shape a realm where ambition collides with destiny.

Core Info:

Between the card and the Lorebook, there’s content and lore covering everything from:
"Pre-Series Arc" to the ongoing plot in the "Land of the Sun Arc"

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want.
There are a total of 160+ characters from across all the anime (and manga i guess...)

Lorebook Info: 269 Entries = 115.000+ Total Tokens

Note: Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with any character you like.

Each character entry has around 500–800 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, appearance, and more.

I don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario like a meeting, an encounter or a date should be enough.

Just get creative. ✌️

LOT OF YAPPING, SKIP IF YOU ALREADY KNOW THE DRILL.

Core History

Pre-Series Backstory

Centuries ago, a demon threatened the Clover Kingdom, but the first Wizard King defeated it, earning legendary status. Elves and humans coexisted until a massacre, driven by betrayal, decimated the elves. The five-leaf grimoire, tied to a devil, emerged. In Hage Village, Asta and Yuno, orphans with opposing talents, dream of becoming Wizard King, setting their rivalry and journey in motion.

Introductory Arc

In Hage Village, Asta, magicless, and Yuno, a magical prodigy, aim to become Wizard King. Asta gains a five-leaf grimoire with Anti-Magic, while Yuno receives a four-leaf grimoire. They fend off thief
creator: WnMinoru
